title: Automated Data Summarizer
description: A reusable AI skill that ingests raw datasets and produces executive summaries with key insights, trends, and anomalies. Integrates with pandas and LLM APIs.
author: Sarah Chen

assets.name: summarize_data.py
assets.content:
import pandas as pd
from openai import OpenAI

def summarize_dataset(df: pd.DataFrame, model: str = 'gpt-4'):
    client = OpenAI()
    summary = client.chat.completions.create(
        model=model,
        messages=[{'role': 'system', 'content': 'You are a data analyst...'}]
    )
    return summary.choices[0].message.content

title: Meeting Notes to Action Items
description: Processes raw meeting transcripts and extracts action items, decisions, and open questions with assignees and deadlines.
author: Emma Thompson

assets.name: meeting_notes.py
assets.content:
from openai import OpenAI

def extract_action_items(transcript: str):
    client = OpenAI()
    response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model='gpt-4',
        messages=[{'role': 'user', 'content': transcript}]
    )
    return response.choices[0].message.content
